A single custom post type with a shared taxonomy is the right call here because tax_query is indexed and meta_query is not, so filtering by age, geography, and eligibility stays performant as the content set grows. Editors get conditional ACF field groups keyed on the taxonomy term, and layout flexibility belongs to block patterns rather than ACF field bloat.
